title: Persist explicit DAO admissions separately
description: Persist bounded key-based explicit root DAO admissions atomically in separate redundant scope-bound storage before first accepted DAO; provision initializes and open reconciles with high-water.
acceptance_criteria: Admission survives restart before first DAO; write failure leaves RAM/storage unchanged; high-water keys are admitted and consistency fails closed; no retirement API.
close_reason: Added separate redundant DAD1 root admission persistence scoped to root/instance/DODAG, atomic durable admission updates, restart-before-first-DAO restoration, bounded capacity/no retirement, corrupt/duplicate rejection, and high-water subset validation. Full lichen-rpl and lichen-node suites and scoped strict Clippy pass.
